content: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py. Will also touch Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Let me know if you're touching quantize()/Image.py too.

Only additive changes near the end of quantize() (after palette build) - shouldn't conflict with error_threshold param additions earlier in the signature/body.
